title: Customer service managers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate the activities of clerical and administrative support workers.

work_activities.element_name: Communicating with Supervisors, Peers, or Subordinates
Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards
Resolving Conflicts and Negotiating with Others
Judging the Qualities of Objects, Services, or People
Coordinating the Work and Activities of Others
Communicating with People Outside the Organization
Providing Consultation and Advice to Others
Interpreting the Meaning of Information for Others
Performing for or Working Directly with the Public
Estimating the Quantifiable Characteristics of Products, Events, or Information
Operating Vehicles, Mechanized Devices, or Equipment
Drafting, Laying Out, and Specifying Technical Devices, Parts, and Equipment

work_context.element_name: Face-to-Face Discussions with Individuals and Within Teams
Work With or Contribute to a Work Group or Team
Deal With External Customers or the Public in General
Coordinate or Lead Others in Accomplishing Work Activities
Health and Safety of Other Workers
Work Outcomes and Results of Other Workers
Dealing With Unpleasant, Angry, or Discourteous People
Dealing with Violent or Physically Aggressive People
Outdoors, Exposed to All Weather Conditions
In an Open Vehicle or Operating Equipment
In an Enclosed Vehicle or Operate Enclosed Equipment
Exposed to Sounds, Noise Levels that are Distracting or Uncomfortable

Exposed to Extremely Bright or Inadequate Lighting Conditions

Exposed to Minor Burns, Cuts, Bites, or Stings
Spend Time Climbing Ladders, Scaffolds, or Poles
Spend Time Kneeling, Crouching, Stooping, or Crawling

Spend Time Bending or Twisting Your Body

Impact of Decisions on Co-workers or Company Results

Pace Determined by Speed of Equipment

tasks.task: Resolve customer complaints or answer customers' questions regarding policies and procedures.
Supervise the work of office, administrative, or customer service employees to ensure adherence to quality standards and proper procedures.
Plan for or coordinate office services, including equipment or supply acquisition, maintenance, relocation, and security services.
Monitor inventory levels and requisition or purchase supplies as needed.
Develop work schedules according to budgets and workloads, and prepare and issue work schedules for staff.
Design, implement, or evaluate staff training programs, customer service initiatives, or performance measurement criteria.
Consult with managers or other personnel to resolve problems in areas such as equipment performance or work schedules.
Make recommendations to management concerning staffing decisions or procedural changes.
Develop or update procedures, policies, or standards for the department.
Coordinate activities with other supervisory personnel or departments to facilitate effective teamwork.
Research, compile, and prepare reports, manuals, or other information required by management.
Maintain records pertaining to inventory, personnel, and machine maintenance.
Evaluate employees' job performance and recommend appropriate personnel action.
Train or instruct employees in job duties or company policies.
Implement corporate or departmental policies, procedures, and service standards in conjunction with management.
Provide guidance to employees in handling difficult problems or resolving escalated complaints.

detailed_work_activities.title: Examine documents to verify adherence to requirements.
Maintain current knowledge related to work activities.
Confer with coworkers to coordinate work activities.
Report maintenance or equipment problems to appropriate personnel.
Respond to customer problems or complaints.
Administer personnel recruitment or hiring activities.
Monitor inventories of products or materials.

alternate_titles: Airline Ticket Sales and Reservations Supervisor
